content.text:
```mdl
@ Contract: Non‑Disclosure Agreement (NDA) – Hypothesis:
# “Receiving Party shall not disclose the fact that the Agreement was agreed or negotiated.”
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_12_nda_10

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ The two parties to the NDA
type Party = {
    name: string,          # e.g. "BROOKS' BOTTLING COMPANY, LLC" or "CLIENT"
    role: Role
}

@ Role of a party in the context of the NDA
type Role =
    | Receiving(unit)      # the party that receives Confidential Information (BROOKS)
    | Disclosing(unit)     # the party that discloses Confidential Information (CLIENT)

@ The kind of information that may be disclosed
type DisclosureInfo =
    | AgreementExistence(unit)   # the fact that the Agreement exists / was negotiated
    | OtherInfo(string)         # any other type of information

@ A single disclosure event (for modelling purposes)
type Disclosure = {
    info: DisclosureInfo,   # what is being disclosed
    recipient: Party        # who receives the disclosure
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ The receiving party (BROOKS) – the party that must keep the Agreement existence confidential
entity receiving_party: Party

@ A concrete disclosure event that could occur during the life‑time of the Agreement
entity disclosure: Disclosure

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Functions (helpers)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Returns true if the disclosed information is *not* the existence of the Agreement
func is_allowed_disclosure(d: Disclosure) -> bool:
    case d.info of
        | DisclosureInfo.AgreementExistence(): false
        | _: true

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules (normative requirements)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Prohibition: the receiving party must not disclose the existence of the Agreement
rule F no_disclosure_of_agreement_existence:
    is_allowed_disclosure(disclosure) always
```
